response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his expertise is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Python, D, etc.). While he has some C/C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), it does not meet the required 8–12 years of C++ specialization, nor does he demonstrate deep experience with C++ STL, multi-threading, or industrial automation protocols. His lack of cloud platform experience (Azure) and industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) further reduces his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills demonstrated across diverse projects.
Experience with performance optimization and low-latency systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, Sociomantic).
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects (GISCollective).
concerns: Limited C++ experience (primarily C/C++ for LabWindows/CVI, not modern C++ or STL).
No documented experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.).
Lacks exposure to cloud platforms (Azure) and IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards.
